top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fuel Shocks, Rising Prices Threaten India’s Consumption Growth
top_signals.summary: The global energy crisis is threatening to slow spending among India’s vast middle class, undermining a fragile recovery in consumption and adding to the woes of an economy already grappling with a markets and currency slump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ramp hits $44 billion valuation as companies look to rein in AI spending
top_signals.summary: Ramp's latest funding round was led by ICONIQ, GIC and the Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
top_signals.summary: Blackstone capped withdrawals from its $79 billion BCRED fund after redemption requests rose from 7.9% to 10%, adding to private market liquidity concerns.
